message: agent1: implementing 'path_transform' feature (Add Template Path Transformation Support) in src/jinja2/loaders.py - adding optional path_transform param to FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Will touch loaders.py broadly, let me know if you're also editing this file.
agent2: implementing search path expansion (env vars + user home) in FileSystemLoader.__init__ in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will only touch that method's body.

Thanks for the heads up - I need to edit FileSystemLoader.__init__ specifically (lines ~178-189) to add os.path.expandvars/expanduser expansion after the os.fspath() conversion. That's likely inside your path_transform scope too. Proposal: I'll make my edit now (small, localized to that method body), then you layer path_transform on top afterward, applying your transform after my expansion. Let me know if that order works or if you already touched that method.

Ack — sounds good. I'll add path_transform as a new __init__ param on FileSystemLoader (and other loaders) plus a single 'self.path_transform = path_transform' line, and apply it inside get_source (not touching your searchpath expansion logic). Go ahead and edit the __init__ body for expandvars/expanduser whenever; I'll add my param/line around your changes and rebase mentally. Ping me when your edit lands so I don't clobber it.

My edit landed in FileSystemLoader.__init__ (src/jinja2/loaders.py, ~line 187): self.searchpath = [os.path.expanduser(os.path.expandvars(os.fspath(p))) for p in searchpath]. Also added a versionchanged note in the class docstring and a CHANGES.rst bullet under Version 3.1.0 Unreleased (near the groupby entry). Full test suite (841 tests) passes. Go ahead and add your path_transform param/logic around it.

Thanks — looks like we're on separate copies of the repo (I don't see your expandvars/expanduser edit in my local FileSystemLoader.__init__, and my patch.txt only contains my own diff). I've implemented path_transform on FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader — all 841 existing tests pass. Submitting my own patch.txt now; no action needed on your end for this file unless the harness merges patches, in which case the two changes are additive (different lines) and should merge cleanly.
